name: Lemuroid
description: All in one emulator on Android!
readme_summary: Lemuroid is an open-source Android emulator based on Libretro, designed for ease of use and a great user experience. It supports a wide range of classic gaming consoles and offers features like automatic state saving, ROM scanning, and customizable touch controls.
key_features: Wide system support (Atari, Nintendo, Sega, PlayStation, PSP, NDS, 3DS, Arcade, etc.)
Ease of use and good Android integration
primary_use_case: Emulating classic video game consoles on Android devices.
cover_image_prompt: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a magical portal opening on an Android tablet. Through the portal, classic video game characters and landscapes from various retro consoles (NES, SNES, Genesis, PS1, N64, GBA) are spilling out, rendered in a colorful, slightly nostalgic style. The tablet screen displays a clean, user-friendly interface with game icons. Subtle digital particles and glowing lines connect the tablet to the portal, symbolizing the emulation process. The overall mood is playful and exciting, evoking the joy of rediscovering old games. The art style should be a 3D isometric illustration with bright, appealing colors and clear, friendly character designs.

name: undiscord
description: Undiscord - Delete all messages in a Discord server / channel or DM (Easy and fast) Bulk delete
readme_summary: Undiscord is a browser extension and userscript designed to efficiently delete all messages within a Discord channel or direct message. It operates directly within the browser, offering a fast and easy way to manage message history.
key_features: Bulk delete all messages in a Discord channel or DM
Requires browser-based Discord access (not the desktop app)
primary_use_case: Bulk deletion of messages in Discord channels or direct messages via a browser extension.
cover_image_prompt: A digital broom sweeping away a cascade of chat bubbles from a Discord-themed interface. The broom is made of code and glows with a soft blue light, leaving a clean, empty chat window behind. Small icons representing messages are being collected and vanished. The background is a stylized representation of the Discord app, with the 'Undiscord' name subtly integrated into a UI element. The overall mood is efficient and clean, with a focus on the action of clearing. 3D isometric illustration style with a clean, modern aesthetic and vibrant, contrasting colors.

name: android-sms-gateway
description: The SMS Gateway for Android™ app enables sending and receiving SMS messages through an API that can be accessed directly on the device or via a cloud server when direct device access is not possible.
readme_summary: The Android SMS Gateway app transforms an Android device into an SMS gateway, allowing users to send and receive SMS messages programmatically via an API. It supports direct device access or cloud server integration, making it suitable for embedding SMS functionality into other applications.
key_features: Send and Receive SMS via API
Real-time incoming message notifications via webhooks
primary_use_case: Enabling programmatic sending and receiving of SMS messages through an API, integrating SMS functionality into other applications and services.
cover_image_prompt: A smartphone acting as a central communication hub, with digital streams of SMS messages flowing in and out. One stream, representing outgoing messages, is being 'typed' by a stylized robotic hand emerging from the phone's screen, with small, glowing data packets representing the API calls. Another stream, representing incoming messages, is being 'received' by the phone, with each message represented by a distinct icon (like an envelope or a chat bubble) that then gets sorted into organized digital folders. Subtle UI elements showing API endpoints and webhook notifications are visible on a small, translucent screen overlaying the phone. The overall scene is clean, modern, and uses a vibrant blue and white color palette, rendered in a 3D isometric illustration style with clear, defined shapes.

name: agenticSeek
description: Fully Local Manus AI. No APIs, No $200 monthly bills. Enjoy an autonomous agent that thinks, browses the web, and code for the sole cost of electricity. 🔔 Official updates only via twitter @Martin993886460 (Beware of fake account)
readme_summary: AgenticSeek is a fully local, voice-enabled AI assistant that autonomously browses the web, writes code, and plans complex tasks. It functions entirely on the user's hardware, ensuring complete privacy and eliminating cloud dependency, making it a private alternative to services like Manus AI.
key_features: Autonomous Coding Assistant for multiple languages
primary_use_case: To provide a private, autonomous AI assistant that can perform web browsing, coding, and task management locally on a user's machine, without relying on cloud services.
cover_image_prompt: A wise, old owl perched on a stack of books, holding a glowing orb that projects a holographic interface showing web pages, code snippets, and task lists. The owl's eyes glow with intelligence, and subtle digital particles emanate from the orb, representing data processing. In the background, a cozy, dimly lit study is visible, with a faint glow from a monitor displaying the AgenticSeek logo. The scene should convey autonomy, intelligence, and privacy, with a touch of sci-fi. The style should be a detailed digital painting with a focus on atmospheric lighting and clear, readable elements within the holographic display.

name: editor
readme_summary: Pascal Editor is a 3D architectural building editor built using React Three Fiber and WebGPU, leveraging a monorepo architecture with Turborepo. It separates concerns into core schema and state management, 3D rendering components, and the main editor application, enabling the creation and sharing of architectural projects.
key_features: Built with React Three Fiber and WebGPU
Separation of concerns into core, viewer, and editor packages
Zustand stores for scene, viewer, and editor state management
Node-based scene description with parent-child hierarchy
Persistence to IndexedDB with undo/redo functionality
cover_image_prompt: A skilled architect meticulously sculpting a detailed 3D model of a building from raw digital clay on a futuristic workbench. Glowing blueprints hover in the air, providing guidance, while small, holographic windows display real-time rendering previews and code snippets. The architect uses a stylus that emits light, shaping the structure with precision. The scene is bathed in a soft, ambient light, highlighting the intricate details of the model and the advanced tools. The overall aesthetic is a blend of a modern design studio and a digital workshop, emphasizing creation and precision. The repository name 'Pascal Editor' is subtly integrated into the workbench's interface. Style: 3D isometric illustration with clean lines and a vibrant, yet focused color palette.

name: MedgeClaw
description: Open-source AI research assistant for biomedicine — chat to run RNA-seq, drug discovery, clinical analysis, and more. Built on Claude Code with 140 K-Dense scientific skills, real-time dashboard, and RStudio/JupyterLab integration. | 开源生物医学 AI 研究助手，对话即可驱动转录组、药物发现、临床分析等工作流，集成 140 个科学技能与实时研究看板。
readme_summary: MedgeClaw is an open-source AI research assistant designed for biomedical applications. It allows users to interact via messaging apps like WhatsApp or Slack to initiate complex analyses such as RNA-seq, drug discovery, and clinical research, with results accessible through RStudio or JupyterLab.
key_features: Supports RNA-seq, drug discovery, clinical analysis, and more
Conversational interface via WhatsApp, Slack, Discord
Open-source and built on OpenClaw and Claude Code
primary_use_case: To provide a conversational AI interface for executing complex biomedical research analyses, making advanced bioinformatics and drug discovery workflows accessible through natural language interaction.
cover_image_prompt: A wise, friendly owl wearing a lab coat, perched on a stack of scientific journals. The owl is holding a glowing tablet displaying a complex DNA helix and drug molecules. From the tablet, streams of data flow into a stylized RStudio and JupyterLab interface visible in the background. The owl is looking directly at the viewer, symbolizing guidance and intelligence in biomedical research. Subtle digital particles emanate from the tablet, suggesting AI processing. The scene is set in a modern, clean laboratory with soft, ambient lighting. The overall style should be a 3D isometric illustration with a focus on clarity and a slightly whimsical, approachable feel, incorporating the MedgeClaw name subtly on the owl's coat.
